title: 10 vs 11 vs 111
wikitext:
[]: 1.0 vs 1.1 vs 1.11 [1.x Spoilers only]             Quote Post by MasterOfPuppets » Sat Sep 19, 2009 3:46 pm They will be skipping the release of 1.0 in America and jumping straight to 1.1. Should I wait for the release of 1.11 or just buy 1.1?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Sep 19, 2009 3:54 pm This belongs in the rebuild sub-forum and I would say get whichever that comes out first.

[]:             Quote Post by MasterOfPuppets » Sat Sep 19, 2009 3:55 pm Uh oh, can anyone move this please?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 19, 2009 5:59 pm 1.0: Film version of You are (not) alone; what's seen in theaters. 1.01: First DVD release of the film, complete with crappy darkness problem. 1.11: Second DVD and first Blu-Ray release, with the darkness problem fixed and a few new scenes added to the start.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sat Sep 19, 2009 6:00 pm 1.11(?) sounds best to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Sat Sep 19, 2009 6:04 pm If it wasn't, kinda defeats the purpose of having it in the first place.

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Sat Sep 19, 2009 6:05 pm Agreed; as far as films are concerned, I can display a very unusual degree of patience (since I have consigned myself to the fact that I won't be able to watch any movies at all until at least a year or two after their DVD release).

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sat Sep 19, 2009 9:49 pm from what i heard 1.0 also had darkness problems in theaters

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Sep 19, 2009 10:27 pm Why did the film have darkness problems in the first place?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 19, 2009 10:57 pm The film was fine in Japanese theaters according to Ornette, and the 1.0 dub (yes, the real film since Funimation has rights to all three) looked okay to me, too. Why 1.01 had that problem, no idea.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Sep 20, 2009 12:29 pm Saw 1.0 in theaters here in the States just recently. You could tell it's 1.0 cause Shamshel's ribcage was doing a jig as it flew over the ocean and EmArgency was abound. 1.01 hits DVD (no Blu-Ray it seems) on November 17 and is the same thing as 1.0 with just a few digital fixes. 1.11 hits DVD/Blu-Ray in the Spring and retouches the images a little and adds three cute but mostly inconsequential scenes to the first act of the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by sean_sean_sean_sean » Sun Sep 20, 2009 12:39 pm ... and adds three cute but mostly inconsequential scenes to the first act of the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Sep 20, 2009 12:50 pm Scene three is "Random distracting Ritsuko fanservice" as we're introduced to the smartest woman in the franchise by seeing her hot wet ass get out of LCL in a swimsuit. It's the same thing they did in the TV series. Then there's a few extensions added onto some previously existing scenes but all in all the additions add up to about 3 extra minutes.

[]:             Quote Post by Kanchan » Sun Sep 20, 2009 2:57 pm How did Evangelion make a billion on only 26 episodes.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Sep 20, 2009 3:22 pm Kanchan wrote: How did Evangelion make a billion on only 26 episodes.

[]:             Quote Post by R-U-4-Zeruel » Sun Sep 20, 2009 3:51 pm Kanchan wrote: How did Evangelion make a billion on only 26 episodes.

[]:             Quote Post by EdZ » Fri Sep 25, 2009 9:19 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: 1.0: Film version of You are (not) alone; what's seen in theaters. 1.01: First DVD release of the film, complete with crappy darkness problem. 1.11: Second DVD and first Blu-Ray release, with the darkness problem fixed and a few new scenes added to the start.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Sep 25, 2009 9:33 pm Um, Funimation announced that 1.01 is being released in November and 1.11 is Spring of next year. Also, where did you get that bit of news that the US 1.01 won't have the darkness issue?

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Fri Sep 25, 2009 9:44 pm How many versions of 1.0 do you think they will release? I think they will keep this up until we have 1.1111.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Sep 25, 2009 10:01 pm I'd like to say RoE 3.14 but it has not come out yet and we don't know if 2.0 will be getting the same treatment. =P And we are discussing RoE 1 anyway so it wouldn't fit in the first place.

[]: 1.0 vs 1.1 vs 1.11 [1.x Spoilers only]             Quote Post by MasterOfPuppets » Sat Sep 19, 2009 3:46 pm They will be skipping the release of 1.0 in America and jumping straight to 1.1. Should I wait for the release of 1.11 or just buy 1.1?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Sep 19, 2009 3:54 pm This belongs in the rebuild sub-forum and I would say get whicheve
